title: Cobblemon Z-A Nurses
description: Edited version of the Nurse Joy Villager variant that resembles the Pokemon Center Attendants from Legends Z-A
body:
An edited version of the Nurse Joy Villager variant from Cobblemon, made to resemble the pokemon center clerks from Legends:Z-A.

In order to access, rename a Nurse villager to 'Joy'. It's reccomended to use a plains villager, as other biome types haven't been tested and might have overlays that interfere with the texture.

Feel free to use this, but please give credit if youre sharing it.
